ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problem_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem instance */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem instance (e.g., ft06.txt) */,
  "instance_size" INTEGER /* Size of the problem instance (e.g., number of variables) */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of optimization problem (e.g., scheduling, resource allocation) */,
  "instance_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the problem instance */,
  "instance_source" TEXT /* Source of the problem instance (e.g., research paper, dataset) */,
  "instance_constraints" TEXT /* Constraints associated with the problem instance */,
  "instance_objective" TEXT /* Objective function of the problem instance */,
  "instance_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the problem instance was created or uploaded */,
  "instance_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the problem instance was last modified */,
  "instance_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the problem instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_instances_instance_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., branch and bound) */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm (e.g., exact, heuristic, metaheuristic) */,
  "algorithm_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_complexity" TEXT /* Computational complexity of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_source" TEXT /* Source of the algorithm (e.g., research paper, software library) */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was created or implemented */,
  "algorithm_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last modified */,
  "algorithm_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_algorithm_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization run */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem instance being optimized */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the optimization run was executed */,
  "computational_time" REAL /* Computational time taken by the optimization run */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the optimization run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the optimization run */,
  "run_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the optimization run */,
  "run_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the optimization run */,
  "run_environment" TEXT /* Computational environment where the run was executed */,
  "run_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the optimization run */,
  "run_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the optimization run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_runs_run_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_runs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES problem_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "best_solution" REAL /* Best solution found by the algorithm */,
  "mean_solution" REAL /* Mean solution found by the algorithm */,
  "worst_solution" REAL /* Worst solution found by the algorithm */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "metric_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was created */,
  "metric_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interval_metrics" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the metric was evaluated */,
  "evaluations" INTEGER /* Number of evaluations performed at this interval */,
  "interval_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the interval metric */,
  "interval_type" TEXT /* Type of interval */,
  "interval_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_sizes" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population size */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Size of the population used in the optimization run */,
  "population_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the population size */,
  "population_type" TEXT /* Type of population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_sizes_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm parameter */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the algorithm parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the algorithm parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "parameter_range" TEXT /* Range of valid values for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "computational_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each computational resource */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of computational resource (e.g., CPU, memory) */,
  "resource_amount" REAL /* Amount of computational resource used */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the computational resource */,
  "resource_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_computational_resources_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "solution" TEXT /* Final solution found by the algorithm */,
  "solution_quality" REAL /* Quality of the final solution */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result */,
  "result_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was created */,
  "result_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)
